eligibility.title: Return request
eligibility.eligible: You can request a return for this order within the return window.
eligibility.notDelivered: Returns are available only for delivered orders.
eligibility.missingDeliveryDate: The return window cannot be calculated for this order right now.
eligibility.expired: The return window for this order has expired.
eligibility.activeReturn: An active return request already exists for this order.
eligibility.none: No return request is recorded for this order.

form.adminNotePlaceholder: Write the rejection reason or processing note

messages.conflict: This return request was updated by another operation. Refresh and try again.

errors.reasonTooLong: Return reason must be 1000 characters or fewer.
errors.notesRequiredForOther: Please clarify the reason when choosing 'Other'
errors.adminNoteTooLong: Admin note must be 1000 characters or fewer.
errors.submitFailed: Could not submit the return request. Try again.
errors.cancelFailed: Could not cancel the return request. Try again.

list.title: My returns
list.subtitle: All return requests you've submitted.
list.empty: You haven't submitted any return requests yet.
